description: Docling is a document-processing project and service focused on converting documents into structured data for AI and downstream processing. The docling.ai site presents the project, documentation links, community resources, and related content such as blog posts and papers.
summary: docling.ai exposes a public HTTP API for its website pages, documented by an OpenAPI spec at https://docling.ai/openapi.json; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found on the docling.ai domain.
